creator: aldis@bsdroot.lv
text:
Update for playd (playd.sh) to v1.4.0

In this version I finally figured how to implement playlist
randomization in pure sh. So now --rand --randomize functions
are finally available for this version of playd :)

http://pastebin.com/2Dq1vijW

BSDroot.lv --> coming soon
